name: H.E. Kamel El-Wazir
title: Minister of Trade, Egypt
quote: Egypt is Not Just a Corridor — It is a Destination
intro: Egypt's Minister of Trade sits at the centre of one of the most ambitious infrastructure transformations in the Arab world. In this exclusive interview, he speaks candidly about the Safaga corridor, Egypt's role as a global logistics hub, and what the next decade demands from the region's leaders.
